title: Infosys and Incora Announce Multi-Year AI-Enabled Supply Chain Collaboration
detailed_summary: Infosys and Incora announced a new strategic collaboration to advance artificial intelligence across Incora's global supply chain operations. Under the multi-year alliance, Infosys will use Infosys Topaz and the Infosys EdgeVerve AI Next Platform to support operations across more than 60 countries, integrate with Incora's existing multiERP landscape, and improve visibility, accuracy, responsiveness, and decision-making across core operational workflows. Infosys will lead the design and deployment of a non-intrusive AI platform intended to harmonize data and processes without disrupting day-to-day operations.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting, and Incora, a leading provider of innovative supply chain solutions in the aerospace and defense industry, today announced a new strategic collaboration  to advance the use of artificial intelligence across Incora's global supply chain operations.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Incora and Infosys Collaborate to Advance AI-Enabled Supply Chain Operations
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the existence and purpose of the strategic collaboration.

important_text_spans.text: Through the multi-year alliance, Incora will work closely with Infosys to implement AI-enabled capabilities supporting operations across more than 60 countries.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Incora and Infosys Collaborate to Advance AI-Enabled Supply Chain Operations
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the duration and operational scale of the alliance.

important_text_spans.text: The initiative leverages Infosys Topaz, an AI-first set of services, solutions and platforms using generative AI technologies, including the Infosys EdgeVerve AI Next Platform
important_text_spans.section_heading: Incora and Infosys Collaborate to Advance AI-Enabled Supply Chain Operations
important_text_spans.reason: Identifies the Infosys platforms involved in the collaboration.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys will lead the design and deployment of a non-intrusive AI platform that harmonizes data and processes across Incora's systems without disrupting day-to-day operations.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Incora and Infosys Collaborate to Advance AI-Enabled Supply Chain Operations
important_text_spans.reason: Describes Infosys's role and the intended implementation approach.
